summary: MetaMiner is a metabologenomic pipeline which integrates metabolomic and genomic data to identify RiPPs and biosynthetic gene clusters encoding them.
MetaMiner identifies putative BGCs and corresponding precursor peptides as a first pipeline step.
MetaMiner constructs putative RiPP structure databases as a second pipeline step.
MetaMiner matches tandem mass spectra against the constructed post-translationally modified RiPPs structure database using Dereplicator as a third pipeline step.
MetaMiner enlarges the set of described RiPPs via spectral networking as a fourth pipeline step.
